sub_pixel_system.notes: Not documented; light gun game with screen-space targeting, not character movement-based

special_mechanics.name: Light Gun Targeting
special_mechanics.description: Player uses NES Zapper light gun to shoot at CRT television screen; three attempts per round to hit on-screen targets (ducks or clay pigeons)

special_mechanics.name: Target Movement
special_mechanics.description: Ducks fly across screen with increasing speed; clay pigeons launched into distance. Difficulty progresses with faster targets

tier_notes: Tier 2: Duck Hunt is a light gun shooter with no player character physics (walk, jump, gravity). Movement data does not apply. Game mechanics center on targeting accuracy and timing rather than character control. Documentation available but game design is inherently non-movement-based.
